components.name: Primary Button
components.description: Primary action button used across toolbars and dialogs.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: #1560BD; color: #FFFFFF; padding: 10px 14px; border: none; border-radius: 6px; font-family: Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif; font-weight: 700; font-size: 12px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 200ms cubic-bezier(0.2,0,0,1), transform 150ms; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #0D47A1; transform: translateY(-1px); } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 3px solid rgba(21,96,189,0.12); outline-offset: 2px; } @media (prefers-reduced-motion: reduce){ .ds-btn-primary{ transition: none; transform: none; } }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.description: Secondary/ghost button used in toolbars and inline actions.
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { background: transparent; color: #152040; padding: 10px 14px; border: 1px solid #C2D0E8; border-radius: 6px; font-family: Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12px; cursor: pointer; } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { background: #EEF3FB; } .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { outline: 3px solid rgba(21,96,189,0.06); outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Input Field
components.description: Text input with clear focus state and accessible labels.
components.css: .ds-field { display: inline-block; } .ds-input { background: #F8FBFF; border: 1px solid #C2D0E8; padding: 8px; border-radius: 6px; font-family: Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12px; color: #152040; } .ds-input:focus-visible { border-color: #1560BD; box-shadow: 0 0 0 4px rgba(21,96,189,0.08); outline: none; } .ds-input:disabled { background: #F0F4FA; color: #B8C8DC; }

components.name: Card
components.description: Container for grouped information and controls.
components.css: .ds-card { background: #FFFFFF; border: 1px solid #EEF3FB; border-radius: 8px; padding: 16px; font-family: Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif; color: #152040; } .ds-card h3{ margin:0 0 8px 0; font-size:15px; font-weight:700; }

components.name: Sidebar
components.css: .ds-sidebar { width: 320px; background: #FFFFFF; border-right: 1px solid #DDE5F0; padding: 12px; box-sizing: border-box; }

components.name: Canvas Overlay (BBox)
components.description: SVG overlay pattern for bounding boxes and labels on the canvas.
components.html: <svg class="ds-overlay" viewBox="0 0 800 600" width="800" height="600"><rect x="100" y="80" width="240" height="160" class="ds-bbox"></rect><text x="104" y="76" class="ds-label">person</text></svg>
components.css: .ds-overlay { pointer-events: none; } .ds-bbox { fill: none; stroke: #F07820; stroke-width: 2px; shape-rendering: crispEdges; } .ds-label { font-family: Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif; font-size: 12px; fill: #FFFFFF; background: rgba(21,96,189,0.9); }

components.name: Toast (Success)
components.description: Transient success toast used for brief confirmations (export complete, saved).
components.css: .ds-toast { display:flex; gap:8px; align-items:center; padding:10px 14px; border-radius:6px; background:#E8F7EF; color:#0B6B3A; box-shadow: 0 6px 18px rgba(0,0,0,0.08); font-family: Helvetica, Arial, sans-serif; } .ds-toast-success { background: #E8F7EF; color: #0B6B3A; }

components.name: Toast (Error)
components.description: Transient error toast for actionable failures.

components.name: Modal / Dialog
components.description: Centered dialog for confirmations and workflows.
components.html:
Confirm export

Exporting will write files to disk.
components.css: .ds-modal-backdrop { position:fixed; inset:0; display:flex; align-items:center; justify-content:center; background: rgba(0,0,0,0.35); } .ds-modal { width: 560px; background:#FFFFFF; border-radius:8px; padding:20px; box-shadow: 0 24px 48px rgba(0,0,0,0.2); } .ds-modal-actions { display:flex; gap:8px; justify-content:flex-end; margin-top:16px; }

components.name: Tooltip
components.description: Small contextual helper used on hover/focus for controls.
components.css: .ds-tooltip { background: #152040; color: #FFFFFF; padding:6px 8px; border-radius:6px; font-size:11px; box-shadow: 0 6px 18px rgba(0,0,0,0.12); }

components.name: Badge / Chip
components.description: Compact badge for class labels and quick filters.
components.css: .ds-chip { display:inline-block; background:#EEF3FB; color:#1560BD; padding:4px 8px; border-radius:999px; font-size:12px; font-weight:700; }

components.name: Toggle / Switch
components.description: Small on/off toggle used in settings panels.
components.css: .ds-toggle { width:44px; height:24px; background:#DDE5F0; border-radius:999px; border:none; position:relative; cursor:pointer; } .ds-toggle .ds-toggle-knob { position:absolute; left:3px; top:3px; width:18px; height:18px; background:#FFFFFF; border-radius:50%; transition:left 150ms; } .ds-toggle[aria-pressed="true"] { background:#1560BD; } .ds-toggle[aria-pressed="true"] .ds-toggle-knob { left:23px; }

components.name: Dropdown / Menu
components.description: Compact dropdown menu used for context actions.
components.css: .ds-menu { display:none; position:absolute; background:#FFFFFF; border:1px solid #C2D0E8; border-radius:6px; padding:6px; box-shadow: 0 12px 36px rgba(0,0,0,0.12); } .ds-dropdown:hover .ds-menu { display:block; } .ds-menu-item { display:block; padding:8px 12px; border-radius:4px; background:transparent; border:none; text-align:left; width:100%; } .ds-menu-item:hover { background:#EEF3FB; }

narrative.overview: Research-focused, practical, and legible UI that puts imagery first.

rules.name: The One-Voice Rule
rules.body: Primary blue is the single dominant accent.
